title: Androcalva reticulata
taxonomy: Androcalva reticulata belongs to the family Cunoniaceae and is native to Australia. It is a flowering plant species within the genus Androcalva. The Cunoniaceae family consists of various flowering plant species that are native to Australia and New Zealand. This family is part of the larger order Oxalidales.
